title: MODEST MEANS PROGRAM - 211info
text: OREGON STATE BAR MODEST MEANS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Matches moderate-income households with attorneys willing to work for reduced fees. Modest Means attorneys handle only family law, criminal defense, foreclosure, and landlord/tenant matters. There are a limited number of Modest Means attorneys, and they are not available in all areas of Oregon. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Eligibility depends on the type of legal matter, client income and assets, and availability of participating lawyers. The program is intended to help those who earn too much to qualify for legal aid, but who cannot afford traditional legal fees. Legal matter must be in Oregon and both parties must live in Oregon. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 684-3763 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 620-0222 Main phone (800) 452-8260 Toll-free Main phone (503) 684-3763 Toll-free in Oregon (800) 452-7636 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or an application. Applications are also available online. Completed applications may be returned by email, mail, or FAX. FEES: $35 maximum for the first 30-minute consultation, a reduced retainer (deposit against fees), and an hourly fee based on income ($60, $80, or $100/hour depending on income and assets) DOCUMENTS: Completed application LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Lawyer Referral Services Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - CLIENT ASSISTANCE OFFICE LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - LEGAL LINKS LEGAL SERVICES - LAWYER REFERRAL SERVICE LEGAL SERVICES - MILITARY ASSISTANCE PANEL LEGAL SERVICES - YOUTH PROBLEM SOLVERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE BAR
